content: Backend: core/wallet_registry.py + routers/wallet_registry.py + wire dans server.py — endpoints publics et admin testent OK
Frontend admin: WalletRegistrySection.tsx (5 cartes éditables + Mint Address) + monté sur /admin
Frontend public: hook useWalletRegistry() + modif Transparency.tsx (badges LOCKED/PENDING + bouton RugCheck)
Audit credentials: confirmer Cabinet Vault AES-256-GCM dans dispatchers + doc CREDENTIAL_FLOW_AUDIT.md
Tests pytest + lint + smoke visuel + doc SPRINT_TRANSPARENCY_TRUST.md
Validation finale + status check pour push GitHub
